summary: The implementation covers all 7 requirements with comprehensive backend and frontend functionality. The backend provides a complete data model with all required fields and CRUD operations. The frontend implements a professional dashboard, creation/editing forms with validation, detailed project views, and a sophisticated earth-tone visual theme. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: User authentication system with Internet Identity integration
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists 'User authentication or multi-user access control' as a non-goal, but the implementation includes full Internet Identity authentication with login/logout functionality in Layout.tsx, useInternetIdentity.ts hook, and access controls in backend (creator validation for update/delete operations)

Backend implements creator Principal tracking and enforces authorization checks in updateProject and deleteProject functions, which relates to multi-user access control explicitly marked as a non-goal
Backend includes a getProjectsByCreator function that filters projects by creator Principal, which supports multi-user scenarios not requested in the BuildRequest

The BuildRequest explicitly lists 'Notification systems for date deadlines' as a non-goal. While the implementation uses toast notifications for user feedback (success/error messages), this could be interpreted as adding a notification system not requested
